name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new feature or improvement for the immigration hub"
title: "[FEAT] <short description>"
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-discussion"]
assignees: []
---

## ✨ Feature Summary

<!-- A clear one-paragraph description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## 🎯 Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What gap in the immigration hub does it address?
     Example: "As a new user researching NIE procedures, I can't find a way to..." -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe your proposed solution in detail.
     Include mockups, wireframes, or example flows if helpful. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why is your proposal better? -->

## 📦 Affected Area

<!-- Which part of the platform does this affect? (check all that apply) -->

- [ ] Forum
- [ ] Real-time Chat
- [ ] Blog
- [ ] Gamification / Ranking System
- [ ] User Profiles / Auth
- [ ] Moderation System
- [ ] Payment / Affiliates
- [ ] Admin Panel
- [ ] Landing Page / Sales
- [ ] Deploy / Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## 📊 Community Impact

<!-- Who benefits from this feature?
     How many users does this affect?
     Is it critical for the immigration workflow or a quality-of-life improvement? -->

## ⚠️ Potential Risks / Trade-offs

<!-- Any technical complexity, performance impact, or scope concerns? -->

## 🔗 Related Issues / Discussions

<!-- Link any related issues, discussions, or external references. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, screenshots, or examples from other platforms. -->
